providers.heading: Metadata Providers
providers.placeholderKeyConfigured: Leave blank to keep existing key

tmdb.label: TMDB API Token
tmdb.placeholderConfigured: Leave blank to keep existing token

transcode.heading: Transcoding
transcode.encoderHelp: Choose the hardware or software encoder used when transcoding. Software (libx264) always works; hardware encoders require the corresponding GPU driver/VAAPI/NVENC support on the server.

library.heading: Library
library.cadenceHelp: How many days between automatic metadata refreshes. Set higher to reduce API calls.

maintenance.heading: Maintenance
maintenance.help: Re-fetch metadata and artwork for every title from TMDB now. Use this after adding or changing your TMDB token. Titles you fixed manually keep their chosen poster. Large libraries may take a while.
maintenance.failed: Rebuild failed — check the server logs.
maintenance.noToken: Add a TMDB API token above and click Save Settings before rebuilding.
